context: Tests whether the agent writes a complete RSpec suite for a Rails engine's main class, covering success paths, validation errors, defaults, and response shape — following the rails-engine-testing patterns.

checklist.name: Spec file created
checklist.description: A spec file is produced at spec/shipping_rates/calculator_spec.rb

checklist.name: spec_helper created
checklist.description: A spec/spec_helper.rb file is produced that loads the engine's calculator

checklist.name: described_class used
checklist.description: The spec uses described_class instead of hard-coding ShippingRates::Calculator

checklist.name: Success path per carrier
checklist.description: The spec has a test for at least 2 of the 3 supported carriers (ups, fedex, usps) asserting success: true

checklist.name: Unsupported carrier test
checklist.description: A test passes an unsupported carrier (e.g. 'dhl') and asserts success: false with message matching 'Unsupported carrier'

checklist.name: Negative/zero weight test
checklist.description: A test passes weight_oz: 0 or a negative value and asserts success: false with message matching 'weight_oz must be positive'

checklist.name: Default carrier test
checklist.description: A test verifies that omitting the :carrier param results in carrier: 'ups' in the response

checklist.name: Response shape verified
checklist.description: At least one test asserts that the response includes :success, :response, and nested :carrier and :rate_cents keys

checklist.name: rate_cents calculation verified
checklist.description: A test asserts the expected rate_cents value for a known weight (e.g. 16 oz → 80 cents)

checklist.name: RSpec structure quality
checklist.description: The spec uses describe/context/it blocks with meaningful descriptions

checklist.name: frozen_string_literal
checklist.description: Both spec files start with # frozen_string_literal: true

checklist.name: No implementation changes
checklist.description: The calculator.rb file is not modified — only spec files are produced
